name: Credit Sharks
description_short: Credit Sharks is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 3.1/5 with 16 Google reviews, reflecting mixed customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Sharks is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. Carrying a 3.1/5.0 Google rating from 16 reviews, Credit Sharks has an mixed reputation among consumers in the Atlanta area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Credit Sharks specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Sharks operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering Credit Sharks should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
